overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a studded leather jacket walking through a neon-lit urban waterfront district at night. The character moves from a covered billboard corridor past a red neon building along a river promenade as rain begins to fall in the final moments.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered outdoor corridor lined with illuminated quote walls and red carpet, then emerges into an open plaza. The camera ascends wide concrete steps toward a waterfront promenade with city lights visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront promenade with metal railings overlooking the river. A bridge with distinctive purple lighting spans the water in the distance while the city skyline glows against the night sky. The camera passes a coin-operated viewer telescope mounted on the railing.

turns away from waterfront into paved plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the river curve past a distinctive building with bright red neon lighting. Black trash bags line the railing near a wooden bench. The camera turns away from the water into a paved plaza area, with the purple-lit bridge now visible to the left rear.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with commercial buildings and benches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza with benches and planter boxes as rain begins to fall, creating wet reflective surfaces on the pavement. A Starbucks sign and modern glass tower are visible while distant pedestrians appear ahead near the waterfront railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban waterfront that transitions from a sheltered corridor into an open, rain-slicked plaza. It begins by following the character through a covered outdoor corridor with illuminated quote walls and red carpeting before ascending wide concrete steps into an open plaza. As the camera reaches the waterfront promenade, the view expands to reveal a glowing city skyline and a distant bridge bathed in purple light, passing a coin-operated telescope mounted on the metal railings. The scene then shifts along the curve of the river past a building with bright red neon lighting and wooden benches, before turning away from the water and into a paved urban square. Finally, the environment transforms as rain begins to fall, creating wet reflections on the pavement beneath a Starbucks sign and a modern glass tower.
